stemHtml: A straight line is drawn on a Lambert conformal conic chart, on which Chart Convergency = Earth Convergency at latitude 42°, from A (48°_ 155°E) to B (36°_ ___°__). The true course of the straight-line track at A is 060°T and at B is 046°T. Determine the hemisphere in which the track is drawn and the final longitude at B:
